message:
fix: wrap remaining enterprise Content components in memo (#9799)

Apply the same memo() fix from PR #9794 to the remaining 18
enterprise compliance dashboard Content components. PR #9794
only fixed ChangeControlAudit and SLSADashboard (the two pages
reported in #9787), but all pages under /enterprise/* are
vulnerable to the same render cascade via VersionCheckProvider
-> UnifiedDashboard -> DashboardHealthIndicator -> useClusters().

Fixes #9787

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
